channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DGI&P Launches Passport Home Delivery Service to Enhance Convenience
item.description: The Directorate General of Immigration and Passports (DGI&P) has introduced a passport home delivery service via private courier to improve applicant convenience across Pakistan. This initiative, dire...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader funeral and international diplomatic tensions
item.description: The article details the preparations for the funeral of Iran's late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, who was killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes. The funeral, scheduled for July 4-9, will involve millions of m...

item.title: Iran's Khamenei Honored in State Funeral Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: The state funeral of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed in February 2026 by US and Israeli airstrikes, is being held in Tehran as part of a week-long series of mass funeral processio...

item.title: BBC Radio 2 Breakfast Show Transition: Gary Davies Steps Down, Sara Cox Set to Take Over
item.description: Gary Davies has concluded his tenure hosting the BBC Radio 2 breakfast show, acknowledging the initial challenges he faced during his time in the role. Davies took over the morning slot following the ...

item.title: CBC investigation finds StubHub allowed speculative ticket listings before official release of World Cup and Olympic tickets
item.description: A CBC News investigation has found that StubHub, a major ticket resale platform, allowed the listing and apparent sale of speculative or “ghost” tickets for major sporting events, including the FIFA W...

item.title: Comelec Disqualifies MILF Candidate in Maguindanao del Sur Ahead of BARMM Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has disqualified Anwar Salipada Alamada, a candidate for the United Bangsamoro Justice Party (UBJP) in Maguindanao del Sur, due to allegations of false representa...

item.title: PFIPC DG Faces Eight-count Charge Over Alleged Forgery and Impersonation
item.description: Adeniyi Adeyemi, convener of the disputed Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC), is set to appear in court over allegations of forgery and impersonation. The Nigeria Police Force...

item.title: Trump's Unusual Nocturnal Habits and Schedule Analysis
item.description: A new analysis of President Donald Trump's schedule reveals patterns of minimal public appearances and extended periods of inactivity. According to a Daily Beast review of official records, Trump had ...

item.title: Top 12 Movies to Stream This Month: A Curated List of Must-Watch Films
item.description: The article highlights a curated list of 12 movies available for streaming this month, emphasizing their cultural significance and entertainment value. It mentions films like 'I Am Frankelda,' 'A.I. A...

item.title: Man detained after criticizing Green councillor over outdoor drinking restrictions
item.description: A man in London faced police scrutiny after criticizing his local Green councillor over regulations on outdoor drinking. The incident sparked a debate about the balance between public safety and indiv...

item.title: Bus accident in Pakistan leaves 40 dead and 8 injured
item.description: A tragic bus accident in Pakistan's Balochistan province resulted in 40 fatalities and 8 injuries when the vehicle plunged into a roadside ditch. The incident occurred on Friday, with the bus travelin...

item.title: Kenya TikToker Charged with Inciting Religious Hostility
item.description: Abdi Hassan Abdullahi, known as 'Sharu', has been charged with ethnic and racial contempt and cyber harassment after posting a TikTok video alleged to incite religious hostility in Garissa County. The...

item.title: Elevation Point Wealth Partners Increases Merck & Co. Stock Holdings by 108.9%
item.description: Elevation Point Wealth Partners LLC significantly boosted its investment in Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) during the first quarter of 2026, increasing its holdings by 108.9% to 116,727 shares. This acquisit...

item.title: Middle Class Struggles with Inflation and High Interest Rates in Philippines
item.description: The Philippine middle class is increasingly bearing the brunt of economic pressures caused by high inflation and elevated interest rates, according to a report by the Philippine Institute of Developme...

item.title: Tamil Nadu Expands Thayumanavar Scheme to Benefit More Elderly and Disabled Citizens
item.description: The Tamil Nadu government is set to expand the Chief Minister’s Thayumanavar Scheme, which provides essential commodities through ration shops to elderly citizens and persons with disabilities. Curren...

item.title: Meta's AI initiatives face delays as Zuckerberg acknowledges slower progress than anticipated
item.description: In an internal town hall meeting, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg informed staff that the development of AI agents has not accelerated as expected, despite significant investments and workforce realignments....

item.title: Haruki Murakami's New Novel 'The Tale of KAHO' Releases in Tokyo
item.description: The article discusses the release of Haruki Murakami's new novel, 'The Tale of KAHO,' which is set to go on sale. Fans are invited to a midnight event in Tokyo to mark the novel's debut. The piece hig...

item.title: South African Cabinet intensifies immigration enforcement following nationwide protests
item.description: The South African Cabinet has reaffirmed and strengthened its stance on undocumented migration following recent nationwide protests held on June 30. In a briefing after Wednesday’s Cabinet meeting, Mi...

item.title: Tanzanian culture shines at Paris fashion showcase
item.description: Tanzanian fashion and cultural heritage are set to captivate international audiences in Paris as preparations reach their final stages for a landmark event celebrating Swahili creativity. The 'Usiku w...

item.title: US Blocks UN Support for AU Peacekeeping Mission in Somalia, Threatening Stability
item.description: The United States has blocked UN support for the African Union's peacekeeping mission in Somalia, risking its continuation. The AUSSOM mission, which has been critical in combating al-Shabaab militant...
